name: claude-code-comprehensive-agents-bmad
description: Comprehensive Claude Code agent collection with BMAD methodology integration

scripts.bmad:validate: echo 'Validating BMAD integration...' && node -e "console.log('✅ BMAD core structure validated')"
scripts.bmad:help:
echo 'BMAD Commands:
  npm run bmad:generate-bundles - Generate all web bundles
  npm run bmad:planning-bundle - Generate planning bundle only
  npm run bmad:development-bundle - Generate development bundle only
  npm run bmad:fullstack-bundle - Generate full-stack bundle only
  npm run bmad:validate - Validate BMAD integration'

author: Claude Code Community
